nasb.text: Your prophets have seen for you False and foolish visions; And they have not exposed your iniquity So as to restore you from captivity, But they have seen for you false and misleading oracles.

esv.text: Your prophets have seen for you false and deceptive visions; they have not exposed your iniquity to restore your fortunes, but have seen for you oracles that are false and misleading.

cnv.text: 你的假先知為了你所見的異象， 盡是虛謊和愚昧； 他們沒有顯露你的罪孽，使你的命運得以挽回； 他們為你所得的默示，全是虛謊，是引人走錯路的。

ccb.text: 你的先知所见的异象虚假无用。 他们没有揭露你的罪恶， 以致你被掳。 他们给你的预言虚假谬误。
